description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: For a U.S. citizen planning a 10‑day tourism trip to France, find a suitable short‑stay Schengen tourist visa option and save it to your trip planner.

target_names: Short-stay Schengen (Type C) – Tourism – France (U.S. citizens)

tasks.name: For a U.S. citizen planning a 10‑day tourism trip to France, find a suitable short‑stay Schengen tourist visa option and save it to your trip planner.
tasks.description: For a U.S. citizen planning a 10‑day tourism trip to France, find a suitable short‑stay Schengen tourist visa option and save it to your trip planner.

tasks.instruction: For a U.S. citizen applying for a tourist visa to India, choose the cheapest processing option whose estimated delivery is by mid‑April 2026 and whose total price is under $160, then continue with that choice.
tasks.name: For a U.S. citizen applying for a tourist visa to India, choose the cheapest processing option whose estimated delivery is by mid‑April 2026 and whose total price is under $160, then continue with that choice.
tasks.description: For a U.S. citizen applying for a tourist visa to India, choose the cheapest processing option whose estimated delivery is by mid‑April 2026 and whose total price is under $160, then continue with that choice.

tasks.instruction: Start a Vietnam tourist visa application for a Canadian traveler, choose the cheaper 30‑day single‑entry tourist option instead of the multiple‑entry one, set a planned entry date in June 2026, select the regular processing speed, and continue to the shipping step.

target_names: Vietnam Tourist – Single entry – 30 days (Canadian citizens)

tasks.name: Start a Vietnam tourist visa application for a Canadian traveler, choose the cheaper 30‑day single‑entry tourist option instead of the multiple‑entry one, set a planned entry date in June 2026, select the regular processing speed, and continue to the shipping step.
tasks.description: Start a Vietnam tourist visa application for a Canadian traveler, choose the cheaper 30‑day single‑entry tourist option instead of the multiple‑entry one, set a planned entry date in June 2026, select the regular processing speed, and continue to the shipping step.

tasks.instruction: Book the earliest available morning appointment in May 2026 at the New York City application center for a general Schengen visa category and confirm it.
tasks.name: Book the earliest available morning appointment in May 2026 at the New York City application center for a general Schengen visa category and confirm it.
tasks.description: Book the earliest available morning appointment in May 2026 at the New York City application center for a general Schengen visa category and confirm it.

tasks.instruction: Start a family visa application for three U.S. travelers going to Brazil, add all three travelers, then on the shipping step choose the return shipping option that gives the lowest total cost for the group and proceed to the order summary.

target_names: Brazil tourist group application – Smith family

tasks.name: Start a family visa application for three U.S. travelers going to Brazil, add all three travelers, then on the shipping step choose the return shipping option that gives the lowest total cost for the group and proceed to the order summary.
tasks.description: Start a family visa application for three U.S. travelers going to Brazil, add all three travelers, then on the shipping step choose the return shipping option that gives the lowest total cost for the group and proceed to the order summary.

tasks.instruction: Add two tourist visa services for travel to Japan and, if needed, include an extra service so that your cart subtotal reaches at least $300, then apply a promo code that gives 20% off qualifying orders and proceed to guest checkout.
tasks.name: Add two tourist visa services for travel to Japan and, if needed, include an extra service so that your cart subtotal reaches at least $300, then apply a promo code that gives 20% off qualifying orders and proceed to guest checkout.
tasks.description: Add two tourist visa services for travel to Japan and, if needed, include an extra service so that your cart subtotal reaches at least $300, then apply a promo code that gives 20% off qualifying orders and proceed to guest checkout.

tasks.instruction: Use the help center search to find an article about visa refund policies that mentions service fees in the preview, open it, and save or bookmark it to your account.

target_names: Refund policy for visa refusals and cancellations

tasks.instruction: Use the order tracking page to open an existing order by entering its order number and last name, then send a note asking whether any additional documents are required before mid‑March.

expected_values.message_text: Please let me know if any additional documents are required before March 15.

tasks.name: Use the order tracking page to open an existing order by entering its order number and last name, then send a note asking whether any additional documents are required before mid‑March.

tasks.instruction: Open an existing visa order via the manage‑order page, try upgrading the return shipping from standard mail to express courier, and keep whichever option results in an order total of no more than $200 before confirming the changes.
